---
title: "Indian Physical Geography"
subtitle: "Physiographic divisions, drainage systems, climate, and natural vegetation of India."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

Welcome to the **Indian Physical Geography** module.

---

{{< include geography-of-india/01-physiography-of-india.md >}}
{{< include geography-of-india/02-drainage-systems.md >}}

{{< include geography-of-india/04-soils-and-vegetation.md >}}

---

## Quick Reference

{{< include indian-physical/29-key-scholars-indian-physical.md >}}

---
